message:
feat(daemon): add event broadcasting, benchmark queue, and alert management

Introduces core infrastructure for real-time daemon observability and
benchmark orchestration, enabling the dashboard to receive live updates
and the scheduler to manage benchmark requests.

EventBus (events.rs):
- Tokio broadcast channel for daemon events
- JSON Lines formatted event payloads
- Event types: telemetry updates, benchmark status, worker changes
- Configurable buffer size with 256 default
- Thread-safe subscription model for WebSocket handlers

BenchmarkQueue (benchmark_queue.rs):
- FIFO queue for benchmark trigger requests
- Per-worker rate limiting with configurable minimum interval
- RateLimitInfo response with retry_after guidance
- Request tracking with UUID and timestamps
- Thread-safe with Mutex-protected state

AlertManager (alerts.rs):
- Alert severity levels: Info, Warning, Error, Critical
- Alert kinds: WorkerOffline, WorkerDegraded, CircuitOpen, AllWorkersOffline
- Duplicate alert suppression with configurable window (default 5min)
- Automatic alert clearing on worker recovery
- API-friendly AlertInfo serialization for status responses
- Severity-based sorting (critical first, then by recency)

Status transition handling:
- Healthy -> Unreachable: Error alert
- Healthy -> Degraded: Warning alert
- Degraded/Unreachable -> Healthy: Clear alerts
- All workers unreachable: Critical aggregate alert

This infrastructure supports:
- Real-time dashboard updates (bead y8n)
- Benchmark scheduling (bead wpk)
- Prometheus alert integration (bead 597)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
